breakdown: This PR fixes the streaming passthrough to normalize rewards_box payloads that use non-standard keys (xp/gold_pieces instead of xp_gained/gold). The code adds fallback logic in normalize_rewards_box_for_ui() and applies it before persisting in _resolve_canonical_level_up_ui_pair(). Naming is clear, error handling uses defaults appropriately, and test coverage is comprehensive using real LLM. Main gaps are type safety (no TypedDict) and documentation (function lacks docstring).
key_changes: Add fallback key handling in normalize_rewards_box_for_ui: check xp then xp_gained, gold_pieces then gold
Pop normalized keys (xp, gold_pieces) from dict after reading to prevent duplication
Add test file testing_mcp/test_streaming_passthrough_normalization.py that exercises the fix with real LLM
